loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: This meter class (electrical UPS input) does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output voltage/current; these slots are honest-blanked as they are off-domain for this asset.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing active power trends as proxies for battery sub-scores (SOC, DC Bus, Thermal) — this electrical meter does not measure battery-specific scores.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Showing autonomy readiness as a load-factor proxy (active power vs rated capacity); backup time and headroom are derived estimates from energy/power data as no battery SOC is measured.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing active power trend as a proxy for autonomy/readiness scores — the UPS meter does not log battery-specific autonomy, backup time, or readiness scores, so these series are filled with the available load data.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Battery Health (This meter class (electrical UPS input) does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output voltage/current; these slots are honest-blanked as they are off-domain for this asset.).
